precondition: Run against one immutable released Grove package through each host's real clean marketplace channel; static generation or manifest inspection cannot satisfy this contract.
completion_rule: All four cases must retain the required artifacts, bind them to the same package tree SHA-256 and host version, and pass independent review before S22/S23 or either host surface may be promoted to supported.

cases.consumer_path_shape: <temp>/one two/three four/five six/seven eight/nine ten/eleven twelve/thirteen fourteen/fifteen sixteen/consumer
<temp>/one two/three four/five six/seven eight/nine ten/eleven twelve/thirteen fourteen/fifteen sixteen/consumer
